# Planning Brief - 2026-06-27

Source: `.github/research/2026-06-27-research.md`

Open `auto-implement` queue before this run: **0** (verified via
`gh issue list --label auto-implement --state open`).

## Summary

Three small, self-contained items derived from upstream commits on
2026-06-26 / 2026-06-27. All three fit a single engineering day total
and are independent (no ordering dependency at the file level), but the
execution order recommended in the research brief is preserved when
issues are picked up by `auto-implement`: #2 (queue UX) -> #1 (MCP name
cap) -> #3 (router auto-disable).

The opencode #34125 / #34145 MCP OAuth items are explicitly deferred
(missing OAuth discovery + token store) and are not in this batch.

## Issues created

| #    | Title                                                                | Category | Size  |
| ---- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ----- |
| #862 | [mcp] Sanitize and cap MCP tool names for OpenAI-shaped deployments  | mcp      | small |
| #864 | [command] /queue list and /queue clear for chained follow-up prompts | command  | small |
| #863 | [config] Auto-disable a route after N consecutive permanent failures | config   | small |

Total: 3 new issues. Maximum allowed this run: 5. Below cap deliberately
- the research brief produced exactly three actionable items and creating
filler issues to hit the cap would dilute backlog quality.

## Codebase validation notes

The research brief cites specific line numbers; current `src/` confirms
they are accurate as of HEAD:

- `src/mcp/client.ts:133` -- `mapToolInfo` (caches `tool.name` as-is into
  `McpToolInfo.name`).
- `src/mcp/client.ts:478` -- `callTool(serverName, toolName, args)`
  signature; needs the reverse-lookup map for the sanitized->raw name.
- `src/mcp/client.ts:546` -- `findToolServer` (linear scan over
  `connection.tools`); must match against the transformed name.
- `src/providers/transform.ts:449` -- `lowerMcpToolsForOpenAIShaped`
  forwards `tool.name` verbatim; once `mapToolInfo` returns a sanitized
  name, no change here is required, which keeps the diff narrow.
- `src/cli/interactive.ts:101` -- `submitPromptQueue: string[]` on
  `ReplState`. Drained at `:2431` via `state.submitPromptQueue?.shift()`.
- `src/cli/interactive.ts:117` -- `enqueueSubmitPrompt(state, prompt)`
  push path; logs a truncated preview.
- `src/cli/interactive.ts:1085` -- the `case 'mcp':` slash branch is the
  insertion-point neighbour for the new `case 'queue':` branch.
- `src/core/router.ts:167` -- `routePrompt(prompt, options)`. Callers:
  `src/core/orchestrator.ts:21`, `src/core/streamingOrchestrator.ts:71`,
  `src/core/agenticChat.ts:352`. There is no per-deployment ID surface;
  routing returns a `modelId`, so the auto-disable counter is keyed by
  `modelId` (the research brief's `deploymentId` fallback to `modelName`
  collapses to just `modelId` in our codebase).
- `src/core/error-backoff.ts` -- already handles transient 5xx via
  exponential backoff (per `extractStatusCode` regex `[45]\d{2}`).
  The new permanent-failure counter must NOT increment on 5xx /
  network errors; those stay owned by `ErrorBackoff`.
- `src/config/routingConfig.ts:25` -- `RoutingPreferences` is the
  natural place for a new `routeFailureThreshold: number` field
  (defaulted to 3, merged into defaults at `:131`).

## Risk and ordering

- **#2 first**: zero coupling, REPL-local, lowest risk. Touches one
  case branch + one helper.
- **#1 second**: changes the cached `McpToolInfo.name` shape. Downstream
  consumers (`findToolServer`, `callTool`) must look up the original
  via a new `Map<sanitized, raw>` to avoid breaking servers that
  already use spec-compliant names. Tests must cover passthrough.
- **#3 third**: introduces stateful router behaviour. The counter is
  process-local (no persistence), increments only on documented
  permanent classes (401, 403, 404, `model_not_found`,
  `deployment_not_found`), resets on success, and the warning is
  printed exactly once per route per session.

## Deferred / not in this batch

- opencode #34125 + #34145 (MCP OAuth refresh + error surfacing).
  Needs a full OAuth discovery + token store; tracked as a future
  research item, not an issue yet.
- claude-code 7-cycle dryness streak and aider 30-day silence
  surfaced in the research carryover -- to be addressed by
  `role-management` (cadence change), not by `auto-implement`.
